claims.summary: Dense multi-paragraph reflection must still preserve the final canonical NEXT action and semantic residue.
claims.disposition: verify strict canonical NEXT extraction and dense-prose regressions

claims.summary: Strict action syntax should remain distinct from fuzzy prose interpretation.
claims.disposition: verify deliberate strict-versus-fuzzy parser boundaries and rejection cases

claims.summary: Witness and codec interpretation may inform reflection but cannot become executable control.
claims.disposition: verify provenance and typed authority refusal across the parser-to-dispatch path

claims.summary: Fuzzy control inference, bypass dispatch, or Shadow mutation changes live semantics and authority.
